title: Product Description for E-commerce
scenario: Create a product description for a new eco-friendly reusable water bottle. The description should highlight the benefits of using the bottle, its features, and why customers should buy it. The description should be under 150 words and include at least two benefits of the bottle's eco-friendliness. The tone should be informative and persuasive.
constraints: Must include at least two benefits of the bottle's eco-friendliness

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and eco-friendliness requirements.
Evaluate if the tone is informative and persuasive.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the description is clear and easy to understand.
